changes: Print speed slider for CC2 — adjust speed factor while printing or paused
Dynamic camera URL for CC2 — fetched via MQTT on connect instead of hardcoded
Delete file button in the file browser (CC1 and CC2)
Spool almost empty push notification — configurable gram threshold in Notification settings
Light mode toggle in Settings
CC2 print-complete notification now fires reliably (CC2 goes directly to standby, not 'complete' state)
Fixed push notification errors after modular backend refactor
Fixed CC1 print time display (CurrentTicks/TotalTicks normalisation, contributed by snazy2000)
Fixed fractional seconds showing in time display (contributed by snazy2000)
Print options modal before starting a print — thumbnail preview, build plate, time-lapse and bed levelling (contributed by snazy2000)
CC1 file list now shows estimated print time, layer count and filament usage (contributed by snazy2000)
Fixed camera placeholder not showing when printer is offline (contributed by snazy2000)
Printers sub-page in Settings — add, edit and remove printers without leaving the settings modal
Edit and delete buttons removed from printer cards (managed via Settings → Printers)
Print speed slider for CC1 — adjust speed factor while printing or paused (Cmd 403 / PrintSpeedPct)
Modular backend: server split into auth, state, persistence, discovery, spoolman, ws_handler, http_handler and printers modules (contributed by snazy2000)
AMS/Canvas multi-material hub support — active tray auto-assigns linked spool (contributed by snazy2000)
WSS WebSocket on port 8766 so PWA and HTTPS users get a proper secure connection
Web Push notifications: print complete, layer checkpoint, nozzle still hot, nozzle overheat
Settings modal with Change Password and Notifications subpages
Discover and Add Printer moved to header; removed + button from sidenav
Fixed CC2 status stuck on 'printing' after print completes
Fixed auth-status API returning 500 for unauthenticated requests
Camera stream excluded from service worker fetch interception (fixes MJPEG on iOS PWA)
Replaced gear icon on printer cards with pencil/edit icon
Added Settings gear to sidenav with change-password modal
Moved Sign out to bottom of sidenav, removed from header
Fixed CC2 status showing 'printing' after print completes
Fixed CC2 light button not reflecting state after click
Fixed CC2 print progress showing over 100% (layer count used as percentage)
Fixed CC2 filament usage stuck at initial connection value
Fixed CC1 camera feed dropping during printing
Added password authentication with first-time setup via web UI
Added Spoolman integration: filament spool inventory with auto-deduction after each print
Added ELEGOO filament catalogue import from SpoolmanDB (97 filament types)
Added EAN barcode scan to auto-fill spool brand, material and colour
Docker image published to ghcr.io — two-command install, no git clone needed
Initial release
CC1 (Centauri Carbon 1) support via SDCP v3.0 over WebSocket
CC2 (Centauri Carbon 2) support via MQTT
Live status: idle, printing, warming up, paused, leveling, complete, cancelled, error
Temperature monitoring: nozzle, bed and chamber with live target values
Print progress: layer count, percentage, elapsed and remaining time
Filament tracking: live mm/g per print and cumulative history log
Camera feed proxied through Spooler (CC2)
Controls: pause, resume, stop, light toggle
Auto-discovery via UDP broadcast
PWA: installable on Android and iOS
HTTPS with self-signed cert on port 8443
